title: How Many Dates Before a Decision? Pacing in Shidduch Dating
title_zh: 决定前需要几次约会？配婚约会的节奏
title_he: כמה פגישות לפני החלטה? קצב הדייטים בשידוכים
author: Torah Light Project

chinese_parallels.concept: Three visits before proposal (三顾茅庐, sān gù máo lú)
chinese_parallels.connection: Chinese tradition of patience and persistence in important relationships parallels measured approach in shidduchim

chinese_parallels.concept: Seasons of relationship (春夏秋冬, chūn xià qiū dōng)
chinese_parallels.connection: Chinese understanding of natural timing and seasons applies to relationship development

torah_sources.topic: A time for everything under the heavens
The importance of timing in relationships

key_concepts: Purposeful dating with marriage in mind
Quality over quantity in dating experiences
target_audience: Young adults dating for marriage; families supporting children in shidduchim
practical_applications: Recognizing signs of compatibility or incompatibility
Balancing family input with personal decision-making
Understanding different cultural approaches to courtship timing
Making confident decisions about relationship progression
notes: Practical guidance on timing decisions in shidduch dating, balancing efficiency with proper evaluation while respecting individual and cultural differences in decision-making pace.
